description: Priya uploads a team photo from a practice anniversary celebration. Context note mentions the 5-year milestone. Caption Writer should produce 4 variants in her voice, each with a different angle — story, community, behind-the-scenes, question-hook.
asset_description: Group photo of 6 people (dental team) standing in practice reception, all smiling, one holding a cake. Warm lighting. Meadow Lane Dental signage visible on back wall. Team wearing casual clothes (not uniforms) — suggests post-hours informal gathering.
context_note: Our 5-year anniversary — we took this after closing on Friday. Priya has been the owner since day one, Laura joined in year 2. Wanted something for Instagram and LinkedIn. Not too salesy.
